testsuite.name: tests.LoginNegativeTest
testsuite.system-out: ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element p is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5b61a87a0364d205d3a679b5fe9e53c4)] -> xpath: //p[text()='Forgot your password? ']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5b61a87a0364d205d3a679b5fe9e53c4)] -> xpath: //button[text()=' Reset Password ']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element span is displayed. ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5b61a87a0364d205d3a679b5fe9e53c4)] -> xpath: //button[text()=' Cancel ']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed.

✔ ASSERT PASSED: element input is displayed. Entered Text admin in the element ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element input is displayed. Entered Text Admin1234 in the element ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5b61a87a0364d205d3a679b5fe9e53c4)] -> xpath: //button[@type='submit']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element p is displayed.

✔ ASSERT PASSED: element button is displayed. ✔ Clicked Element [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5b61a87a0364d205d3a679b5fe9e53c4)] -> xpath: //button[@type='submit']] Successfully! ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element span is displayed. ✔ ASSERT PASSED: element span is displayed.
